title: Sovereign Enterprise Autoresearch Reactor
one: A proof-governed autoresearch system that runs many sovereign enterprise improvement threads, validates them through Evidence Dockets, and promotes only proven artifacts into future workflows.
problem: Proof Card 006 established the enterprise RSI operating system. The next frontier is autonomous domain optimization: a large institution needs many specialist agents to search for improvements across procurement, security, finance, operations, science, energy, compute, and commercialization without letting unproven discoveries pollute future work.
mission: Launch a sovereign enterprise autoresearch program: decompose a strategic objective into parallel proof missions; route missions to specialist agent cells; run experiments and workflow improvements; require ProofBundles, evaluator harnesses, reviewer attestations, falsification tests, and cost/safety ledgers; settle validated work through AGIALPHA; and grant scoped upgrade rights only after Selection Gate approval.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates a full autoresearch market: sponsor funding, mission budgets, builder claim bonds, proof submission bonds, reviewer and red-team bonds, evaluator incentives, proof-card registration, credential issuance, reputation-weighted routing, reward-vault settlement, AlphaWorkUnit metrology, TreasuryRouter reinvestment, commercialization-performance milestones, and Chronicle memory.
rsi: Recursive self-improvement (RSI) becomes an autonomous improvement market. Weak artifacts spawn hypothesis missions; multiple agent cells test competing improvements; reviewers and red-teamers validate evidence; Selection Gates select only the best safe artifacts; accepted artifacts earn scoped upgrade rights; treasury routing funds the next frontier; Chronicle memory prevents repeated mistakes and compounds discovery over time.
value: This is the autoresearch layer for sovereign enterprises: verified work becomes reusable capability; reusable capability becomes productive capacity; productive capacity funds better agents, tools, audits, compute, experiments, and energy-relevant infrastructure work. It is a bounded practical path toward the value-to-capacity horizon behind the Kardashev-scale thesis.
claim: Experimental proof-card template. It does not claim achieved AGI, superintelligence, guaranteed financial return, legal/tax/security approval, Ethereum mainnet deployment, or Kardashev Type II achievement. It defines a proof program for testing whether RSI-driven enterprise autoresearch can compound evidence, capability, and verified value.
skillsUsed: Sovereign Aim Decomposition
Turns board-level objectives into bounded GoalOSCommit objects with authority, risk, budget, evidence requirements, and measurable success metrics.
Autoresearch Portfolio Design
Splits a strategic enterprise objective into many parallel research and workflow-improvement threads.
Hypothesis Generation and Routing
Assigns hypotheses to specialized agent cells based on domain, cost, risk, evidence burden, and reputation.
Evaluator Harness Construction
Creates measurable tests, baselines, anti-gaming checks, and repeatability requirements for each mission.
ProofBundle Engineering
Packages traces, outputs, cost, safety, evaluation, and replay metadata into auditable Evidence Dockets.
Reviewer Council Arbitration
Coordinates bonded reviewers, red-teamers, challenge windows, attestations, and acceptance/rejection decisions.
Selection Gate Promotion
Grants scoped upgrade rights only to artifacts that survive evidence, evaluation, risk review, and rollback readiness.
Value-to-Capability Treasury Routing
Allocates verified value into future mission budgets, tooling, audit, compute, and capability-building work.
Chronicle Memory Distillation
Stores proven patterns, failed attempts, rejection rationales, and reusable artifacts for future work.
Claim Boundary Enforcement
Prevents the public website and proof cards from claiming achieved AGI, guaranteed ROI, legal approval, security approval, or deployment unless evidence exists.
plansUsed: Define the sovereign enterprise objective, affected domain, risk class, budget, and measurable proof target.
Spawn a portfolio of proof missions across agent cells with different hypotheses and evaluation plans.
Require each builder cell to submit a ProofBundle, evidence root, cost ledger, safety ledger, and reproducibility notes.
Plan D - Reviewer and red-team validation
Use bonded reviewers, red-teamers, challenge windows, and falsification checks before promotion.
Plan E - Selection and scoped propagation
Only selected artifacts receive upgrade rights to influence future workflows, prompts, policies, routes, budgets, or product responses.
Route verified value into higher-value proof missions, better tools, stronger agent cells, audits, compute, and infrastructure work.
goalsUsed: Ensure each accepted artifact can improve future work instead of remaining a one-off output.
Keep private intelligence and sensitive evidence off-chain while making public proof anchors verifiable.
Optimize for verified capacity after cost, risk, uncertainty, coordination overhead, and rollback burden.
Goal 4 - Build a proof market for enterprise improvement
Use AGIALPHA to coordinate sponsors, builders, reviewers, red-teamers, credentials, reputation, and settlement.
Translate verified work into reusable capability, productive capacity, and reinvestment into compute, science, infrastructure, and energy-relevant experimentation.
agentCells: Defines sovereign objectives and decides what outcomes matter.
Break objectives into mission portfolios and success metrics.
Generate candidate improvements and experiment designs.
Implement workflow, policy, procurement, security, finance, or technical artifacts.
Run measurement harnesses, baselines, benchmarks, and replay checks.
Package ProofBundles, hashes, Evidence Dockets, and proof-card artifacts.
Validates evidence and issues attestations under challenge windows.
Searches for reward hacks, unsafe claims, privacy failures, and brittle artifacts.
Routes verified value into future capability budgets.
Maintains recovery paths and canary logic.
Preserves memory of accepted and rejected discoveries.
status: illustrative until live Evidence Docket is completed
